canonicalSpecs.purpose: Language-neutral gRPC and protobuf contract rules.
RPC SDK family layout, manifest, generated output, and verification rules.
SDK generation and consumer integration rules.
RPC contract and SDK verification rules.
Generated output and public export boundaries.
Canonical RPC and SDK artifact naming.

integration.authority: Root SDKWork specs remain authoritative. Local contracts may narrow but must not contradict them.
integration.dependencyPolicy: Consumers use generated RPC SDK clients or approved composed facades only.
integration.sdkPolicy: RPC clients are injected at runtime composition boundaries; business modules do not assemble raw gRPC metadata.
integration.languagePolicy: Generated protobuf output remains isolated from future RPC host adapters and service facades.

commands: node ../sdkwork-sdk-generator/bin/sdkgen.js generate --protocol rpc --input sdks/sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc-sdk/rpc/sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc.manifest.json --proto-root apis/rpc --output sdks/sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc-sdk/sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc-sdk-rust --name SdkworkKnowledgebaseRpc --sdk-name sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc-sdk --language rust --package-name sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc-sdk-rust --fixed-sdk-version 0.1.0 --dry-run --no-sync-published-version

node ../sdkwork-sdk-generator/bin/sdkgen.js generate --protocol rpc --input sdks/sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc-sdk/rpc/sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc.manifest.json --proto-root apis/rpc --output sdks/sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc-sdk/sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc-sdk-typescript --name SdkworkKnowledgebaseRpc --sdk-name sdkwork-knowledgebase-rpc-sdk --language typescript --package-name @sdkwork/knowledgebase-rpc-sdk --fixed-sdk-version 0.1.0 --dry-run --no-sync-published-version
